title: KS Crab Claw
description: This datapack add a recipe to craft the crab claw (inspired by the mob vote) that let you reach blocks from further away
body:
**KS Crab Claw DataPack / mod**

![ks crab claw](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/95c338c41b62067b7ed615e796e7d21271afef02.png)

This pack add a recipe for the Crab Claw.
The Crab Claw give you +3 block reach when held in any hand.
![Crab Claw recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/87b45db96f443870a1490e289c5346893ceeb030.png)

For the datapack version: the RessourcePack is optionnal but highly recomended, if you use this pack without it the Claw will be displayed as a nether star.
you can find the ressource pack here: 
[https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/kspack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/kspack)
For the mod version: you don't need any ressourcepack, enjoy !

If you have feedbacks or any issue/question, contact me on discord! (@nugrevan) : https://discord.gg/SxarRKTw8k
